name: PipeForce
tagline: Close more deals without the enterprise price tag
metaDescription: PipeForce replaces HubSpot with a full-featured CRM built into your AppBuster stack. Manage contacts, pipelines, and deals — saving $9,600/year.
heroSvg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><text x="50" y="70" text-anchor="middle" font-size="60">📘</text></svg>

features.title: Visual Pipeline Management
features.desc: Drag-and-drop deal stages with real-time revenue forecasting. See your entire sales funnel at a glance and identify bottlenecks before they cost you.

features.title: Contact Intelligence
features.desc: Automatically enrich contact profiles with company data, social profiles, and interaction history. Every touchpoint is tracked without manual entry.

features.title: Email Sequences
features.desc: Build automated outreach campaigns with personalized follow-ups. Track opens, clicks, and replies to optimize your messaging over time.

features.title: Revenue Analytics
features.desc: Detailed dashboards showing close rates, average deal size, and sales cycle length. Break down performance by rep, source, or time period.

features.title: Activity Tracking
features.desc: Log calls, meetings, and tasks directly against deals and contacts. Automated reminders ensure no follow-up falls through the cracks.

features.title: Third-Party Integrations
features.desc: Connect with your email provider, calendar, and marketing tools through native integrations. Sync data bi-directionally without middleware.

includes: Custom deal pipelines with weighted forecasting
Call logging with notes and outcomes
